summary: Tested platform auto-calculation and branch distribution features for SSC Track ERP. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified: By Branch tab, Auto-Calculate button, branch distribution display. Fixed missing platform_id field in Sale/SaleCreate models.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about span inside tbody - cosmetic only, functionality not affected

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: Sale and SaleCreate models were missing platform_id and payment_mode fields, preventing auto-calculation from working
seed_data_creation: Created 6 test sales with platform_id for HungerStation: 4 settled (Feb 2026), 2 unsettled (March 2026) across Test Branch and Branch A
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform auto-calculation feature fully working. Key endpoints: GET /api/platform-payments/calculate (returns commission and branch breakdown), GET /api/platforms/branch-summary (shows per-branch platform pending amounts). Note: calculate endpoint only considers UNSETTLED sales (platform_status != 'settled'). When a payment is recorded, related sales are marked as settled.

auto_calculate_endpoint.details: Returns total_sales, calculated_commission (based on platform rate), expected_amount, branch_breakdown with share percentages

branch_summary_endpoint.details: Returns per-branch pending amounts for each platform with sales, commission, received, and pending breakdowns

record_payment_with_branch_breakdown.details: Auto-calculates commission if not provided, includes branch_breakdown in response based on sales data

by_branch_tab_ui.details: Shows branch-level platform breakdown with sales, commission, received, pending columns

auto_calculate_button_ui.details: Button in Record Payment dialog fetches and fills total_sales, commission_paid, amount_received

branch_distribution_ui.details: Shows branch breakdown with sales amount and receives amount after auto-calculation

missing_platform_id_in_models.issue: Sale and SaleCreate Pydantic models were missing platform_id and payment_mode fields, causing platform sales to not be stored properly
missing_platform_id_in_models.fix: Added platform_id: Optional[str] = None and payment_mode: Optional[str] = None fields to both Sale and SaleCreate models
